summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WiseDrive OBD2 SDK DTC knowledge base functionality. All core DTC knowledge base tests passed including specific and generic DTC knowledge retrieval, enrichment functionality, and API payload transformation.

minor_issues.issue: Regex parsing issues in validation script for P0503 content extraction
minor_issues.impact: Validation script cannot parse complex Kotlin multiline structures
minor_issues.workaround: Manual verification confirms P0503 has comprehensive symptoms and solutions

passed_tests: DTCKnowledgeBase.getKnowledge() for P0503 (specific code in knowledge base)
DTCKnowledgeBase.getKnowledge() for P0999 (generic fallback for unknown codes)
DTCKnowledgeBase.getKnowledge() for U0155 (network code - generic fallback)
ReportTransformer.transform() includes causes, symptoms, solutions in code_details
Mock mode works correctly with full DTC data
Simulated live scan produces DTCs with causes/symptoms/solutions
Data models support knowledge fields validation
